qna_pairs.Query: What country is most famously associated with the origin of ceviche?
What is the primary ingredient used in the sauce of Peruvian aji de gallina?
qna_pairs.Gold Answer: Aji amarillo (Peruvian yellow pepper) paste (Peruvian cuisine)

qna_pairs.Query: According to the text, what is the likely origin of the name "causa" in Peruvian cuisine?
qna_pairs.Gold Answer: A native Quechian word "kausay" meaning "sustenance of life" (Peruvian cuisine)
